summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AUREON budget calculator with all 7 services. Verified mathematical calculations, complexity multipliers, and reset functionality. All core calculator features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: WC Completa maximum price display shows '€11 250' with space instead of '€11,250'

passed_tests: All 6 services appear in calculator selection (Capoto, Microcimento, Pintura Interior, Pintura Exterior, Limpeza Telhados, Remodelação WC)
Pintura Interior: 50m² calculates €350-€750 correctly (€7-15/m²)
Pintura Exterior: 100m² calculates €900-€1600 correctly (€9-16/m²)
Limpeza Telhados: 100m² WITHOUT hidrofugante calculates €500-€1200 correctly
Limpeza Telhados: 100m² WITH hidrofugante calculates €1000-€2400 correctly
Remodelação WC Completa: 30m² calculates €7,050-€11,250 correctly (€235-375/m²)
Remodelação WC Estética: 30m² calculates €4,950-€8,250 correctly (€165-275/m²)
Capoto with silicone finish: 100m² calculates €5,300-€7,700 correctly
Microcimento acetinado: 80m² calculates €4,800-€7,600 correctly
Complexity multipliers work correctly: Simple (-10%), Normal (base), Complex (+20%)
Limpeza Telhados correctly has NO complexity multiplier options
Remodelação WC correctly has NO complexity multiplier options
Reset button ('Nova Simulação') successfully clears form and returns to input view
Form validation prevents submission with empty fields
Hidrofugante checkbox option works correctly for Limpeza Telhados
Bathroom subtype selection (Completa vs Estética) works correctly
Finish type selection works for Capoto and Microcimento services
Service descriptions display correctly when services are selected
Price per m² calculations display correctly in results
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All calculator functionality working with minor display formatting issue

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor formatting fix: WC Completa maximum price displays '€11 250' with space instead of proper comma formatting '€11,250'
